channel.title: ROS on Menghao blog
channel.description: Recent content in ROS on Menghao blog
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2024, Meng blog; all rights reserved.

item.title: ROS2 commands record
item.description: The blog collects some useful ROS2 commands. Workspace 1# Source setup 2source /opt/ros/<ros2-distro>/setup.bash 3# Create workspace 4mkdir -p ~/ros2_ws/src 5# build workspace 6colcon build 7# Source workspace 8source ~/ros2_ws/install/setup.bash 9ros2 launch <package_name> <launch_file_name> Node and Topic 1ros2 node list 2ros2 node info /<node_name> 3ros2 topic list 4ros2 topic info /<topic_name> 5ros2 topic echo /<topic_name> 6ros2 service call /<service_name> <service_type> "<request_data>" Rosbag 1ros2 bag record -a 2ros2 bag play <bag_file_name>.db3 RViz 1# Install 2sudo apt-get install ros-<distro>-rviz2
